contributions.title: Yun Chu, Adi Thakur as a follow-up from yesterday, I'm going to send Dwayne a list of things we need to imp...
contributions.text: Yun Chu, Adi Thakur as a follow-up from yesterday, I'm going to send Dwayne a list of things we need to improve for the Brand Polaris LPs before doing the Weblab testing. Did either of you have your notes written down?

contributions.title: Hey all, this spreadsheet we updated for in-context email overlay is the most up-to-date for Nonbrand landi...
contributions.text: Hey all, this spreadsheet we updated for in-context email overlay is the most up-to-date for Nonbrand landing pages (I just double-checked against the paid search account). It doesn't look like we explicitly target Spanish NB keywords in the US account; only Brand Spanish keywords.

contributions.title: Hey Vijay, I wanted to ask about the in-context email overlay for paid search, because I think there's a ga...
contributions.text: Hey Vijay, I wanted to ask about the in-context email overlay for paid search, because I think there's a gap in my understanding. 1. Regarding your question about wanting to run weblab for understanding the impact of the change; are you saying we should have weblab serve test/control 50/50 to all pages... 2. Timing: Do you know if this test can be completed within March? (Brandon and I want to avoid any overlap with OCI since that's the more important implementation)

contributions.title: Hey all, here's the US' LP with the email overlay experience: business.amazon.com/en/cp/lpa-wholesale and a...
contributions.text: Hey all, here's the US' LP with the email overlay experience: business.amazon.com/en/cp/lpa-wholesale and an example of a page without it.

contributions.title: regarding the reg team supporting, what's the best starting place to contact someone/create a ticket about ...
contributions.text: regarding the reg team supporting, what's the best starting place to contact someone/create a ticket about a solution to promos+email overlay? I want to focus on pushing the email overlay WW before this, but want to have this going in the background.

contributions.title: Hey Dwayne (and Brandon for visibility and ideas), I'm sure you saw the email from Saajan.
contributions.text: Hey Dwayne (and Brandon for visibility and ideas), I'm sure you saw the email from Saajan. My thoughts are, from the time it's taking to figure out issues with weblab from BFCM, is that we wouldn't want to test promos without being confident we can measure incrementality. I've been thinking through potential solutions to still be able to test for Spring Sale...

contributions.title: Hey Alex, we're running into a situation with the Polaris pages.
contributions.text: Hey Alex, we're running into a situation with the Polaris pages. Can you take a look and advise on next steps? Ideally we can revert that specific URL to the older template until the fixes are done, and we're ready to test the Polaris version. The Italy brand page's URL is the same as our old URL, so whenever that was pushed to production, we started sending people to the IT Polaris page, and the team is saying that the CTA on that page is overwriting reftags and sending to the AU registration s

contributions.title: Provide Lorena Q2 expected spend for MX PO
ie%CCP calc - insert MX spend/regs before 9th
Yeah Carlos wanted to wait until after Q1 to have the OP2 budget with Finance.
contributions.text: Yeah Carlos wanted to wait until after Q1 to have the OP2 budget with Finance. Even 100% ie%CCP is lower budget than our OP2, so that's why the budget within the dashboard looks so much lower. I was actually slacking with Lorena earlier this week, and I reminded her about the situation, and let her know what we could expect to spend at 100% and 75%. I also asked for specific guidance on ie%CCP moving forward, and she is having that discussion with Finance.

contributions.title: AU Escalation Prep — Full Brief (v2).
contributions.text: AU Escalation Prep — Full Brief (v2). Filed Apr 1, 2026. Steelman Lena's case, 15 claims across 6 themes. Theme 3 Landing Page Decision: PS pages were globally excluded from Polaris scope. Alex VanDerStuyf confirmed: 'PS pages were not in scope' for 2025. Richard first pushed back citing performance risk, then offered a 50/50 test as compromise. Lena rejected both and mandated 100% switch. Richard executed within 11 days.

contributions.title: Hey Lorena, here are my projections for Q2, based on Q1.
contributions.text: Hey Lorena, here are my projections for Q2, based on Q1. (Brand is doing very well to start the year, and the below are estimates based on that) One thing Carlos mentioned is that starting Q2 we may need to dial down to 75% depending on performance at 100% ie%CCP. Did you happen to have guidance on that? If continuing to target 100% ie%CCP: Apr $79K May $89K Jun $94K Total Q2 $262K Regs 3,966 (+42% vs. OP2). If reducing to 75%: Apr $57K May $64K Jun $67K Total $188K Regs 3,584 (+28% vs. OP2)

contributions.title: Hey Lorena, I had the fall in registrations more due to the holiday, because we don't generally see large s...
contributions.text: Hey Lorena, I had the fall in registrations more due to the holiday, because we don't generally see large shifts in Brand unless there's some kind of seasonality change or events/holidays, etc. In terms of the NB change, yes I decreased the budget there so we could stay close to our 100% ie%CCP goal, but did reduce budget a bit more than needed.

contributions.title: Hey Brandon, I just looked into it and there were a couple things.
contributions.text: Hey Brandon, I just looked into it and there were a couple things. The first was more controllable by us: the event having such a large impact on brand regs (Brand regs were flat MoM from Nov to Dec.). Less controllable: the actual NPV for the account came in at $91, vs. the ~$60 we were expecting. (We were about 60-70% ie%CCP from our expected CCP)
